title: Human Islet Microvasculature Immunofluorescence in Optically Cleared Samples
author: Martha Campbell-Thompson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y3tfynn

steps.title: Incubate the samples with primary antibodies...
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples with primary antibodies on a rocker plate for 48:00:00 1-5 days at Room temperature .

steps.title: Wash the tissue sections with 1xPBS...
steps.instruction: Wash the tissue sections with 1xPBS for five times, minimum 01:00:00 at Room temperature . PBS Phosphate Buffered Saline 10X Solution Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP399-1

steps.title: The following lasers were used for...
steps.instruction: The following lasers were used for imaging each antigen in these images: Track 1- 488- Collagen IV Track 2- 405- GCG, 561- SMA

steps.title: Perform confocal microscopy
steps.instruction: Perform confocal microscopy. Each microscope will require optimization of imaging parameters. LSM 710 (confocal laser microscope, Zeiss, LSM 710, https://www.zeiss.com/microscopy/us/products/confocal-microscopes.html , https://s3.amazonaws.com/pr-journal/bedra.jpg , https://s3.amazonaws.com/pr-journal/bedsa.pdf )

steps.title: Dilute the secondary antibodies to 1:500...
steps.instruction: Dilute the secondary antibodies to 1:500 and prepare at least 1 mL per sample. Incubate for 48:00:00 or more on a rocker at Room temperature .

steps.title: Islet alpha-cells- GCG Stain - Specific...
steps.instruction: Islet alpha-cells- GCG Stain - Specific Stain, Intensity Good, Background LowCollagen IV- basement membranes- Specific Stain, Intensity Good, Background mediumSMA- smooth muscle cells surrounding vessels - Specific Stain, Intensity Good, Background Low

steps.title: Wash the tissue with 1 x...
steps.instruction: Wash the tissue with 1 x PBS 5 times 01:00:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Analyze islet microvascular density by contouring...
steps.instruction: Analyze islet microvascular density by contouring the GCG+ area for islet volume followed by collagen IV and SMA morphometry using Vesselucida360.

steps.title: Make antibody dilution buffer (ABD)
steps.instruction: Make antibody dilution buffer (ABD): 1x PBS containing 2% normal goat serum (NGS) and 0.5% Triton-X 100. PBS Phosphate Buffered Saline 10X Solution Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP399-1 Goat normal serum Vector Laboratories Catalog #S-1000 Triton X-100 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T8787-100

steps.title: For these samples, optical clearing was...
steps.instruction: For these samples, optical clearing was performed using 4% SDS at 60 °C with rocking for up to 3 weeks until the samples reached transparency. Our original protocol used 8% SDS. We have subsequently tested both 4% and 8% SDS at Room temperature and 60 °C . Different tissues should be tested independently for optimal results.

steps.title: Dilute the primary antibodies to 1:200...
steps.instruction: Dilute the primary antibodies to 1:200 in ABD and prepare at least 1 mL per sample.

steps.title: Equilibrate the samples in RIMS containing 0
steps.instruction: Equilibrate the samples in RIMS containing 0.5% sodium azide for at least 12:00:00 before imaging. Transfer to an imaging dish or chamber slide using RIMS as mounting media.
